OffsetPattern.description: This is the name of the defined joint pattern that is used to calculate the joint offsets.

OffsetPatternSF.description: This is the scale factor applied to the joint pattern when calculating the joint offsets. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
